user_system_path: Wire the Got it button on hidden-op Slack cards to log signal→act→outcome tuples to Supabase. Feedback loop accretes the data moat.
allowed_files_raw: Slack interaction route for hidden-op acknowledgments; seam state files; trigger runner for wiring proof
forbidden_files_raw: No schema changes, no app/UI/component changes, no auth/stripe/payment work. Slack interaction path only for hidden-op outcome logging.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
required_browser_proof: Not required. This is a backend interaction handler for signal outcome logging.
acceptance_condition: Hidden-op outcome logging wired: user click Got it on hidden-op Slack card logs CONFIRMED_WORKED outcome to tkg_signals. Signal→act→outcome tuple captured.
stop_condition: Stop when outcome logging is tested, CI green, and seam state files agree on between-rungs status.
anti_regression_checks: hidden-op outcome logging captures signal ID correctly
normal workday-presence path unaffected (still requires state)
next_command: Data moat initialization in progress. Next: wire the outcome endpoint to record full signal→act→outcome tuples.
